HGSS.337.0003:
Manager: My beloved generator!\f
Keep pumping the electricity out to
provide a pleasant life for Kanto!
HGSS.337.0004:
We’ll have to beef up our security
presence so something like this will\r
never happen again!
HGSS.337.0005:
The generator’s up and running.
It’s making electricity to spare.
HGSS.337.0007:
Since the generator’s been fixed, the
Manager has been cheerful.
HGSS.337.0008:
All right! We can finally get the
Magnet Train running again.
HGSS.337.0009:
I collect Pokémon.
Do you have a DUGTRIO?\f
Want to trade it for my MAGNETON? [0200,0000]
HGSS.337.0010:
Yay! I got myself a DUGTRIO!
Thanks!
HGSS.337.0011:
Huh? That’s not DUGTRIO.
What a letdown...
HGSS.337.0012: You don’t want to trade? Aww...
HGSS.337.0013: Hi, how’s my old MAGNETON doing?
HGSS.337.0014:
Staff Mottos:\f
1. Electricity is not infinite.
2. Conserve wherever possible.\r
3. Watch out for each other.\r
4. Idle hands are not allowed.\r
5. Wear shoes with rubber soles.\r
6. The Manager is awesome.
HGSS.337.0015:
Use electricity wisely
for a bright and pleasant life.\r
           Kanto Power Plant
